channel.title: Nerra Network — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts from all Nerra Network podcast shows.

item.title: Modern Investing Techniques
item.description: Short sellers piling into SoFi while XRP gets positive SEC clarity — two clear signals worth dissecting for your portfolio.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla is developing a new family vehicle that Elon Musk calls way cooler than a minivan as the company begins phasing out the Model S and X.

item.title: Omni View
item.description: Trump administration shares 15-point plan to end Iran war as Tehran launches new strikes on US and Israeli targets.

item.title: Modern Investing Techniques
item.description: Brookfield and La Caisse’s $37.25/share takeover of Boralex creates a textbook Canadian M&A premium play worth dissecting.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Cybertruck earns IIHS Top Safety Pick+ while Tesla patents a fresh trailer-style range extender.

item.title: Финансы Просто
item.description: Как найти ипотеку, когда банки говорят «нет»: история одной семьи из Эдмонтона

item.title: Modern Investing Techniques
item.description: Estée Lauder confirms a potential merger suitor yet its stock still struggles — a textbook lesson in market skepticism versus headline optimism.

item.title: Omni View
item.description: Escalating Iran conflict triggers global energy crisis warnings, market turmoil, and emergency government meetings.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Fair zero-determinant strategies break in the periodic prisoner's dilemma, unlike the classic repeated version.

item.title: Modern Investing Techniques
item.description: Stocks jump and oil eases after Trump says Iran is talking with the U.S., despite Tehran’s denials.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla and SpaceX launched the Terafab project to build vertically integrated AI chip production on a massive scale.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: NHTSA has escalated its investigation into Tesla's Full Self-Driving software to the engineering analysis phase.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Researchers are investigating how Mars gravity will change astronauts' skeletal muscle.

item.title: Models & Agents for Beginners
item.description: A new AI that helped build itself? Plus safe ways to test models without breaking anything — today’s news is wild.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Engineered probiotic bacteria infiltrated tumors in mice and produced cancer drugs on site, potentially improving precision while cutting side effects.

item.title: Omni View
item.description: Oil prices fall as U.S. considers releasing sanctioned Iranian crude while Israel-Iran conflict disrupts global energy markets.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Blue Origin has filed plans for a massive constellation of up to 51,600 satellites to host data centers in orbit.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: The vernal equinox arrives today at 10:46 A.M. EDT, marking astronomical spring as the Sun crosses directly over Earth’s equator.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: ESA will charter its own dedicated SpaceX Crew Dragon flight to the ISS to expand astronaut flight opportunities.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Ravens in Yellowstone navigate directly to likely wolf kill sites using memorized landscape patterns rather than following the predators.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Aamjiwnaang First Nation demands full spill details and remediation plan from Suncor following discharge to St. Clair River.

item.title: Финансы Просто
item.description: Банк Канады оставил ключевую ставку на уровне 2,25% — что это значит для вашей ипотеки и сбережений

item.title: Финансы Просто
item.description: Почему ставки по ипотеке снова могут вырасти и что это значит для вашей семьи в Ванкувере

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Canada is investing $200 million in its own Spaceport Nova Scotia to cut reliance on SpaceX for future launches.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran war escalates with US embassy attack in Baghdad and global inflation fears prompting rate hikes.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Picsart launches AI agent marketplace, starting with four agents and adding more weekly for creators.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Elon Musk confirms Tesla's Terafab AI chip plant starts production in just seven days.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran denies its supreme leader's death amid escalating US-Israel strikes and global oil disruptions.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Scientists uncovered evidence of ancient underground water on Mars that may have sustained microbial life longer than expected.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: RL agents scaled to 1,024 layers unlock emergent parkour skills from basic failures.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla's latest software update brings Comfort Braking to Model Y, enhancing smoother stops for owners.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: US bombs Iran's Kharg Island oil hub as Middle East conflict escalates.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: NASA confirms readiness for Artemis 2, targeting a crewed lunar orbit no earlier than April 1.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Google DeepMind's Aletheia agent autonomously advances from IMO math to professional research discoveries.

item.title: Models & Agents for Beginners
item.description: Imagine an AI that solves real math mysteries like a pro researcher—Google just made it happen!

item.title: Финансы Просто
item.description: Банк России может снизить ключевую ставку 20 марта — это повлияет на рубль и ваши переводы семьям в Россию или Украину.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla gains a stake in SpaceX by converting its $2B xAI investment, deepening ties between Musk's companies.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Four US service members killed in Iraq plane crash as Middle East war escalates with Iranian drone strikes.

item.title: Planetterrian Daily
item.description: Researchers found that combining two colon polyp types raises bowel cancer risk up to fivefold.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: NS enforcement order mandates removal of two unauthorized building storeys, setting precedent for permit compliance in development projects.

item.title: Models & Agents
item.description: Perplexity launches "Personal Computer," a $200/month AI agent that automates emails, presentations, and app control 24/7.

item.title: Tesla Shorts Time
item.description: Tesla is ramping up Cybercab production to hundreds weekly at its Austin factory ahead of launch.

item.title: Omni View — Omni‑View Briefing
item.description: Iran strikes oil tankers in the Gulf, surging prices to $100 a barrel amid escalating US-Israel conflict.

item.title: Fascinating Frontiers
item.description: Scientists traced the most energetic neutrino ever detected to blazars powered by supermassive black holes.

item.title: Environmental Intelligence
item.description: Ontario's fast-tracking of Great Bear mine permits under the Mining Act faces Grassy Narrows lawsuit, signaling risks for mining assessments in the province.
